name: pi-council v2 — RPC-based council with bidirectional communication

description: v2 baseline: RPC-based council with bidirectional communication, mock-pi test sandbox, 30/30 tests (20 unit + 10 integration)

asi.hypothesis: Build v2 architecture with RPC-based members, full observability, follow-up support, profiles, and deterministic mock-pi test sandbox
asi.architecture: Council → CouncilMember (pi --mode rpc) → stdin/stdout JSON protocol
asi.test_coverage: 20 unit tests (types, profiles, registry, member state) + 10 integration tests (mock-pi spawn, cancel, events, artifacts, 4-model council, failure handling)

description: Added follow-up tests (T31-T40): steer/abort throws, cancel emits events properly, timeout enforcement, sequential councils, member finish(). Fixed cancel event emission and close handler state guards.

asi.hypothesis: Add follow-up mechanism tests and fix cancel/close lifecycle bugs
asi.fixes: cancel() now emits member_failed event (fixes waitForDone hanging), close handler doesn't overwrite cancelled state, error handler attached before pid check

description: Added edge case tests (T41-T50): duration tracking, listener removal, concurrent councils, spawn failure alive check, finished count, custom system prompt, result artifacts. Updated skill file with bias prevention guidelines.

asi.hypothesis: Add edge case tests and update skill file with bias prevention guidelines
asi.skill_update: Added core principle section on unbiased prompting with DO/DON'T examples

description: Rewrote CLI commands to use new Council core. Removed old config/runner/stream-parser/run-state/format/pid modules. 1720 LOC src+ext (was 945 old + duplication). All 50 tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Rewrite CLI to use new RPC-based Council core, remove old file-based IPC modules
asi.removed_files: config.ts, runner.ts, stream-parser.ts, run-state.ts, format.ts, pid.ts
asi.architecture: CLI commands now use Council class directly, no more file-based process management

description: Added RPC protocol tests (T51-T55): direct mock-pi prompt/get_state/abort protocol compliance, text delta capture verification, event ordering. 55/55 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Add RPC protocol compliance tests against mock-pi directly
asi.test_categories: 20 unit + 10 integration + 10 follow-up + 10 edge + 5 RPC protocol

description: Rewrote README for v2 architecture (RPC, follow-ups, profiles, bias prevention). Updated AGENTS.md. All 55 tests pass.

asi.hypothesis: Update docs to match v2 architecture

description: Added live follow-up tests (T56-T60): follow_up command, steer during streaming, unknown command handling, model output diversity, session stats. 60/60 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Test live RPC follow-up commands (steer during streaming, follow_up queue, unknown command errors, cost tracking)
asi.verified: mock-pi correctly handles steer during streaming with tool calls, follow_up queuing, and returns session stats

description: Added E2E follow-up tests (T61-T65): Council.followUp after completion graceful handling, targeted member follow-ups, idempotent cancel, model spec preservation in results. 65/65 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Test end-to-end follow-up paths through Council class to verify graceful handling of post-completion follow-ups

description: Added crash/tool/edge tests (T66-T70): mock-pi tool execution events, tool event pipeline, custom run IDs, timing assertions. 70/70 tests.

asi.hypothesis: Test tool execution events, custom run IDs, and timing correctness
asi.verified: mock-pi tool_execution_start/end events fire correctly, custom runIds persist through lifecycle, timing invariants hold

description: Added custom output/schema tests (T71-T75): MOCK_PI_OUTPUT env override, 3-model output diversity, results.json/meta.json/prompt.txt schema validation. Added autoresearch.checks.sh for type checking. 75/75.

asi.hypothesis: Add artifact schema validation and output diversity tests
asi.verified: All artifact files have correct schema, different providers produce different outputs, MOCK_PI_OUTPUT env works

description: Simplified: removed tools config, removed fast/read-only profiles (max only), removed timeout. Agents get pi's default tools. Council runs until done or cancelled. 75/75 tests adapted.

asi.hypothesis: Simplify by removing tools config, extra profiles, and timeout per user request
asi.removed: tools param from SpawnOptions/Profile/member.spawn, fast+read-only profiles, timeoutSeconds, --profile CLI flag
asi.rationale: User wants max profile only, no tools config, no timeout — agents use pi defaults and run until done

description: Docker sandbox: tests now run in isolated container (--network none, tmpfs home, non-root user). Fixed module-level path constants to resolve at call time so $HOME overrides work. Fixed extension to deliver every member individually including the last. 75/75.

asi.hypothesis: Move test execution to Docker sandbox for true isolation
asi.fixes: council.ts RUNS_DIR was module-level constant (evaluated at import), now getRunsDir() function. Extension now delivers every member result including last one.
asi.sandbox: Docker: node:22-slim, non-root testuser, --network none, tmpfs /home and /tmp

description: Added sandbox isolation tests (T76-T80): mock-pi crash handling, cancel slow member, tool event propagation through Council, mixed crash+success, slow member completion. New mock-pi wrappers for crash/slow/tools variants. 80/80.

asi.hypothesis: Test crash/slow/tool-call scenarios via mock-pi wrapper scripts through full Council lifecycle
asi.new_files: mock-pi-crash.mjs (MOCK_PI_FAIL=true), mock-pi-slow.mjs (2s delay), mock-pi-tools.mjs (tool calls enabled)
asi.verified: Crash produces member_failed event, cancel during slow processing works, tool_execution events propagate as member_tool_start/end

description: Fixed member hang: removed keepAlive (always close stdin on agent_end), added 10s RPC command timeout. Added live steer/abort tests (T81-T85): steer slow member, abort slow member, targeted steer, mixed cancel, multiple steers. Reduced slow mock from 2s to 500ms. 85/85 in 21s.

asi.hypothesis: Fix member hang on steer by removing keepAlive and always closing stdin on agent_end
asi.root_cause: keepAlive prevented closeStdin on agent_end, mock-pi process waited for more input forever
asi.fixes: Removed keepAlive field entirely, always close stdin on agent_end, added 10s timeout to sendRpcCommand

description: Added stderr observability: MemberStatus.stderr field exposes process stderr. Added tests T86-T90: crashed member stderr, clean stderr on success, full status schema, stderr in council status, spawn failure exit code. 90/90.

asi.hypothesis: Expose member stderr through MemberStatus for full error observability
asi.change: Added stderrOutput field to CouncilMember, exposed as stderr in MemberStatus, verified crash stderr contains error info and success has empty stderr

description: Added member.getSessionStats() for cost/token tracking via RPC get_session_stats. Tests T91-T93: stats null after completion, stats available during processing, stats null on spawn failure. 93/93.

asi.hypothesis: Add getSessionStats RPC command for live cost/token tracking during member processing
asi.design: getSessionStats calls get_session_stats via RPC, returns null if stdin closed or command fails, 5s timeout

description: 🎯 100 tests! Added orchestrator pattern tests (T94-T100): spawn+foreground+results pattern, registry getLatest, single model, event memberIds, complete event result, case-insensitive model filter, unique run dirs. 100/100 in 30s.

asi.hypothesis: Add real-world orchestrator pattern tests to reach 100 test milestone
asi.milestone: 100 tests: 20 unit + 10 integration + 10 follow-up + 10 edge + 5 RPC + 5 E2E + 5 schema + 5 sandbox + 5 steer/abort + 5 observability + 3 stats + 7 orchestrator patterns

description: Enhanced final delivery summary with succeeded/failed counts and total duration. Updated ideas backlog. 100/100.

asi.hypothesis: Add richer summary metadata to extension final delivery

description: Added artifact validation tests (T101-T105): timing in results.json, member output in results.md, error/failure in json+md, run directory completeness (meta.json, prompt.txt, results.json, results.md). 105/105.

asi.hypothesis: Validate all result artifact files contain correct content for success and failure cases

description: Added hurry-up pattern tests (T106-T110): steer all slow members, abort hurry-up, followUp type validation, output event delta verification, 4-model output uniqueness. 110/110 in 33s.

asi.hypothesis: Test the hurry-up pattern (steer/abort to speed up slow members) and verify output event quality
asi.verified: Steer hurry-up works on slow members, abort hurry-up terminates cleanly, text deltas have correct shape, 4 models produce 4 unique outputs

description: Added robustness tests (T111-T115): 10K char prompt, special characters in prompt, cancel/followUp with nonexistent memberIds, double cancel safety. 115/115 in 34s.

asi.hypothesis: Test boundary conditions and defensive coding paths
asi.verified: Long prompts, special chars, nonexistent member targeting, and double-cancel all handled gracefully

description: Added API surface tests (T116-T120): getMembers returns copy, isComplete timing, finish idempotent, double waitForCompletion, unsub function works. 120/120 in 36s.

asi.hypothesis: Verify public API methods behave correctly under various calling patterns
asi.verified: Array copy semantics, timing correctness, idempotent methods, event unsub works

description: Added concurrent/stress tests (T121-T125): 3 concurrent councils, rapid spawn+cancel cycle (5x), all-members-fail, consistent getResult, registry ordering. 125/125 in 37s.

asi.hypothesis: Test concurrent usage and stress patterns
asi.verified: 3 concurrent councils independent, rapid spawn+cancel stable, all-fail handled, getResult idempotent, registry preserves insertion order

description: Added extension contract tests (T126-T130): markdown duration format, result member ordering, getMember validation, status prompt match, unicode handling. 130/130 in 38s.

asi.hypothesis: Test the API contracts the extension relies on
asi.verified: Markdown includes duration, result ordering matches spawn order, getMember safe for invalid ids, unicode preserved in prompt/files

description: Added agreement snapshot to intermediate council-progress messages (shows after 2+ responses). Fixed T53 flaky timing (200ms→500ms in Docker). 130/130 in 39s.

asi.hypothesis: Add agreement snapshot to intermediate followUp messages for early signal
asi.change: Extension now appends responder count and success/fail status after each member beyond the first
asi.fix: T53 abort test had 200ms wait, increased to 500ms for Docker timing

description: Added mixed scenario tests (T131-T135): 4-model mixed ops (cancel 2, steer 1, finish 1), output after cancel, fast+slow mix, crash error in result, cancel timing verification. 135/135 in 40s.

asi.hypothesis: Test realistic mixed operations: partial cancel + steer + completion in same council
asi.verified: Cancel+steer+finish coexist correctly, partial output preserved, crash error propagates to result, cancel timing accurate

description: Added mock-pi variant tests (T136-T140): tools variant generates events then text, crash variant exits non-zero, slow variant timing, fast variant speed, all variants exist. 140/140 in 42s.

asi.hypothesis: Verify each mock-pi variant produces correct behavior for its intended test scenario

description: Added per-model system prompt overrides (systemPrompts option in SpawnOptions). Falls back to shared systemPrompt or profile default. Tests T141-T145: full override, partial, fallback, empty, nonexistent. 145/145 in 43s.

asi.hypothesis: Add per-model system prompt overrides for role specialization
asi.feature: SpawnOptions.systemPrompts: Record<string, string> — per-model prompt override, falls back to systemPrompt then profile default
asi.enables: Role specialization: contrarian, data-driven, risk-focused etc per model

description: 🎯 150 tests! Final validation (T146-T150): status member count, event lifecycle ordering, custom runId persistence, startedAt timing, full 4-model lifecycle with events+artifacts. 150/150 in 44s Docker sandbox.

asi.hypothesis: Add comprehensive lifecycle validation tests to reach 150
asi.milestone: 150 tests across 15 categories: unit, integration, follow-up, edge, RPC protocol, E2E, schema, sandbox, steer/abort, observability, stats, orchestrator, concurrent, contracts, per-model prompts, final validation

description: Added config system: ~/.pi-council/config.json for custom models and systemPrompt. CLI uses loadConfig(). Tests T151-T158: defaults, custom models, corrupt config, empty array, custom prompt, ensureConfig, no-overwrite, malformed model filtering. PI_COUNCIL_PI_BINARY env for CLI testing. 158/158.

asi.hypothesis: Add configurable model list and system prompt from config file
asi.feature: loadConfig() reads ~/.pi-council/config.json, falls back to defaults on missing/corrupt/empty. ensureConfig() creates defaults. CLI ask/spawn use config.
asi.enables: Users can customize models without code changes

description: Added CLI E2E tests (T159-T163): ask with mock-pi via PI_COUNCIL_PI_BINARY, version output, help, list, two-model ask. Fixed module-level path constants in all CLI commands (list/status/results/watch/cleanup). 163/163 in 45s.

asi.hypothesis: Add CLI end-to-end tests via execFileSync + PI_COUNCIL_PI_BINARY env
asi.fixes: All CLI command files had module-level RUNS_DIR constant, now use getRunsDir() function for Docker/test compatibility
asi.feature: PI_COUNCIL_PI_BINARY env var enables CLI testing with mock-pi
